name: iNovaa

name: oJazzer
bio: Hey! My name's Jazzer and I'm an Administrator for Crafting Dead. I run events and coordinate all social media platforms.

bio: I'm Zand and I'm a Community Manager for Crafting Dead. I manage the moderators in game and on discord. The moderation team helps deal with chat and in game assistance.

name: Distroyer5266
bio: My name is Jeremy. I have been a player on Crafting Dead since the day it was created. I am the head builder meaning I lead the team that manages and makes the maps.

name: war_monger
bio: Hi, I'm Ben, I've been doing modeling for Minecraft related projects for 5-6 years now. I primarily work with Flans mod, I own a WW2 content pack named Warfare44.
